name: GAF_SyteLine_MaterialInsert_Tool_v1
description: Add BOM materials (components) to a standard job in SyteLine

data.api_docs:
Method: POST
Endpoint: /update/SLJobmatls
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Content-Type: application/json
Body:
Batch insert multiple material lines in one call:
{
  "IDOName": "SLJobmatls",
  "RefreshAfterSave": true,
  "Changes": [
    {
      "Action": 1,
      "Properties": [
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Job", "Value": "         2"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Suffix", "Value": "0"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "OperNum", "Value": "10"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Sequence", "Value": "1"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Item", "Value": "SA-50910"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "MatlQtyConv", "Value": "1.00"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "UM", "Value": "EA"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "MatlType", "Value": "M"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Units", "Value": "U"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "RefType", "Value": "I"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "AltGroup", "Value": "1"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "ScrapFact", "Value": "0.00"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "Action": 1,
      "Properties": [
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Job", "Value": "         2"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Suffix", "Value": "0"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "OperNum", "Value": "10"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Sequence", "Value": "2"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Item", "Value": "WH-61500"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "MatlQtyConv", "Value": "2.00"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "UM", "Value": "EA"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "MatlType", "Value": "M"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Units", "Value": "U"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "RefType", "Value": "I"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "AltGroup", "Value": "2"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "ScrapFact", "Value": "0.00"}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
NOTE: Action 1 = insert. Include ALL materials for a job in a single Changes array.
Job number must be left-padded with spaces to 10 chars.
OperNum must reference an existing routing operation on this job.
Sequence numbers increment within each OperNum (1, 2, 3...).
AltGroup increments across all materials (1, 2, 3...).
RefType: 'I' for purchased/inventory items, 'J' for sub-assemblies that have their own standard job.
Example Request:
POST /update/SLJobmatls
Add two materials to job 2 on operation 10:
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object indicating success or failure.
Key Response Fields:
- Success: Boolean indicating if all inserts succeeded
- Message: Error message if Success is false
- Items: Array of created material records
Each material should appear with Job, OperNum, Sequence, Item, and _ItemId.
Common errors:
- Invalid Item code (item must exist in SLItems first)
- Invalid OperNum (operation must exist on this job's routing first)
- Duplicate Sequence within same Job/Suffix/OperNum
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Add BOM materials (child items) to a standard job. BATCH: ALL materials in one Changes array.
Fields: Job (10-char padded), Suffix='0', OperNum (must exist in routing), Sequence (1,2,3...), Item (must exist), MatlQtyConv, UM, MatlType ('M'), Units ('U'), RefType ('I'=inventory, 'J'=sub-assembly), AltGroup (1,2,3...), ScrapFact ('0.00').
PREREQ: Items and routing operations must exist first.
SITE: <site> placeholder = [TENANT]_DALS from agent input.
